sentence_reviews.text: Activation or feature scales are standardized to improve conditioning and stability.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Statistics & experimental design, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.
